overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player walks along a covered walkway, enters a building with an indoor garden atrium featuring glass floors and trees, then exits back to the street. The scene features neon lighting, modern architecture, and light traffic.

events.description: passes a pedestrian with a backpack walking in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway, observing the traffic on the left and illuminated panels on the right

notable_agents.action: walking ahead with a colorful backpack, then passed by the ego

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure covering the pedestrian walkway
tall rectangular illuminated panels emitting bright white light
metal railing separating the walkway from the street
futuristic cars with headlights on driving along the road

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a covered urban walkway at night. The path is illuminated by vertical light panels on the right, while traffic moves along the road to the left. The environment is sheltered by an overpass structure, and the ego passes a pedestrian with a backpack around the 13-second mark.

events.description: approaches the Night City building entrance and begins ascending the stairs
enters the building interior, transitioning from artificial exterior lighting to brighter interior illumination

agents.ego_description: ascending concrete stairs and entering the glass-fronted building lobby

entered.detail: illuminated sign with 'NIGHT CITY' text above the building entrance
modern glass facade with automatic doors
wide staircase leading up to the building entrance
glass-enclosed interior space with visible trees inside

segments.scene_description: The ego approaches and enters a modern building marked with 'Night City' signage. The segment captures the transition from the covered walkway to an indoor lobby, ascending concrete stairs and passing through a glass entrance. The lighting brightens as the interior atrium with vegetation becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor garden atrium with glass floors

events.description: enters the indoor garden area with trees growing through glass floor panels
looks down at the glass floor to observe the vegetation below

agents.ego_description: walking through the atrium while looking around at the indoor trees and down at the transparent glass floor panels

entered.detail: transparent hexagonal glass panels revealing vegetation below
large mature tree growing through the glass floor structure
tall bamboo stalks arranged in planters
industrial metal stairs leading to an upper level

segments.scene_description: The ego explores an indoor garden atrium featuring a unique glass floor with trees and bamboo growing through hexagonal panels. The space is illuminated by artificial lighting filtering through the vegetation. The camera looks down at the transparent floor to observe the plants below, then continues walking past a 'NO ENTRY' sign and a metal staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with palm trees and digital billboards

events.description: exits the indoor atrium back to the exterior urban environment
emerges from covered walkway into open plaza with palm trees and large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: exiting the building and walking through an open plaza area with neon signage and palm trees before returning to the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: walking in the distance near the plaza entrance

entered.detail: wide open pedestrian area with wet reflective pavement
tall palm trees lining the plaza
large illuminated advertising screens displaying colorful graphics
bright pink and blue neon signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: The ego exits the building back to the exterior, transitioning from the indoor garden to an open urban plaza. The scene opens up to reveal palm trees, large digital billboards, and neon signage reflecting off the wet pavement. The character walks through this open area before returning to the covered walkway, where other pedestrians and vehicles are visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban corridor into a luminous indoor garden before returning to a vibrant city plaza. It begins with a walk along a covered nighttime walkway illuminated by vertical light panels, passing a pedestrian as traffic flows along the adjacent road. As the camera approaches a building marked with Night City signage, the scene transitions through a glass entrance and up concrete stairs into a bright indoor lobby. The environment then opens into a garden atrium where the camera glides over a hexagonal glass floor revealing trees and bamboo growing beneath the surface, moving past a metal staircase and a no-entry sign. Finally, the camera exits the building back into the open air, shifting from the artificial greenery to a wet urban plaza filled with palm trees, towering digital billboards, and neon reflections.
